intro: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow, is a popular herbal remedy that can be extracted into a tincture to promote healing and reduce inflammation. The tincture is often used to support wound healing, reduce bleeding, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia. When taken internally, achillea millefolium tincture may also help to boost the immune system and provide antimicrobial properties to protect against infections.
